Courts and Tribunals Bill | Commons debates

The other logical absurdity is that, under the Government’s proposed reforms, somebody with a previous conviction may well go above the thre

Courts and Tribunals Bill | Commons debates

I agree entirely with the hon. Gentleman.

Courts and Tribunals Bill | Commons debates
